title: aurinia corymbosa
intro: Aurinia corymbosa, also known as corn poppy or Iceland poppy, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Aurinia corymbosa include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety due to its sedative properties, as well as its ability to support respiratory health by reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
